Antibiotic Range – Franchise Available

Antibiotic Range Pharma Franchise in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma offers a pharma franchise for the antibiotic range across Andhra Pradesh — covering the full AP coastal belt from Srikakulam to Vijayawada. Our flagship antibiotic product is Amoxsenim-CV 625, a WHO GMP certified Amoxicillin-Clavulanate combination manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS.

💊 Amoxicillin + Clavulanate ✅ WHO GMP Certified 📍 All AP Districts Available 🏢 Exclusive Territory Rights
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Market Opportunity

Why the Antibiotic Range is a High-Volume Franchise Opportunity

Antibiotics are among the highest-prescribed and fastest-moving therapeutic categories in every Indian pharma market, particularly across the Andhra Pradesh coastal belt.

Respiratory infections, urinary tract infections, and skin infections are among the most common reasons patients visit doctors across AP — from general practitioners in tier-2 cities like Kakinada and Eluru to specialist clinics in Visakhapatnam and Vijayawada. This creates consistent, high-volume prescription demand for broad-spectrum antibiotic combinations throughout the year.

An Amoxicillin-Clavulanate combination (co-amoxiclav) such as Amoxsenim-CV 625 is one of the most trusted and widely prescribed antibiotic combinations in Indian general practice and across all major specialities. Franchise partners in the antibiotic range benefit from high prescription velocity, broad doctor coverage, and strong pharmacy counter demand.

  • Antibiotics are among the fastest-moving prescription categories in AP pharma
  • Respiratory infections peak seasonally — two demand cycles per year
  • Wide doctor base: GPs, ENTs, pulmonologists, urologists, dentists
  • Strong pharmacy counter movement alongside prescription demand
  • WHO GMP certification builds trust at GP and specialist level
  • Consistent repeat prescription potential once brand is established
Our Antibiotic Product

Amoxsenim-CV 625 – Crasenim Pharma

Amoxsenim-CV 625
Category: Antibiotic Composition: Amoxycillin 500mg + Clavulanic Acid 125mg Form: Tablets Certification: WHO GMP
Franchise Available

Clinical Indications

  • Upper respiratory tract infections (sinusitis, pharyngitis, tonsillitis)
  • Lower respiratory tract infections (pneumonia, bronchitis)
  • Urinary tract infections (cystitis, pyelonephritis)
  • Skin and soft tissue infections
  • Dental and ear infections

Key Clinical Benefits

  • Clavulanate overcomes beta-lactamase resistance — broader efficacy
  • Effective against gram-positive and gram-negative organisms
  • Trusted first-line choice for community-acquired infections
  • Widely accepted across GP and specialist prescribing in AP
Prescribing Specialities

General Physicians, ENT Specialists, Pulmonologists, Urologists, Paediatricians, Oral & Dental Surgeons

Franchise Opportunity

Take the Antibiotic Range Franchise in Your AP District

Crasenim Pharma offers PCD franchise and commission-based MR opportunities for the antibiotic range across all 13 target districts of the AP coastal belt.

PCD Franchise

Exclusive Territory Rights

Own the franchise rights for the antibiotic range in your district. Stock Amoxsenim-CV 625 and earn high wholesale-to-retail margins with no competition from other Crasenim franchisees in your zone.

Commission MR

Earn Per Prescription

Promote Amoxsenim-CV 625 to GPs, ENTs, and pulmonologists in your area. Earn monthly commission on every prescription generated — no investment required to start.

Distributor / Stockist

Wholesale Distribution

Become a regional stockist for the Crasenim antibiotic range. Supply to retailers, clinics, and hospital pharmacies across your district with fast replenishment from Vizianagaram HQ.

Antibiotic range franchise available across: Srikakulam, Vizianagaram, Visakhapatnam, Anakapalli, Kakinada, Rajahmundry, Amalapuram, Eluru, Bhimavaram, Tadepalligudem, Gudivada, Machilipatnam, Vijayawada

View all coverage areas →
For Prescribing Doctors

Why Prescribe Amoxsenim-CV 625 in Your Practice?

Quality Assurance

WHO GMP Manufacturing

Amoxsenim-CV 625 is manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS & Pharmaceuticals Ltd — India's largest contract manufacturer — under WHO GMP certified standards. Every batch meets strict international quality specifications.

Clinical Reliability

Consistent Potency & Bioavailability

Standardised formulation ensures consistent active ingredient release, predictable clinical response, and patient compliance — backed by AKUMS's stringent QC protocols.

Affordability

Accessible Pricing for Patients

Competitive patient pricing ensures your prescription is fulfilled — not substituted. Better affordability equals better adherence and improved outcomes.

MR Support

Dedicated Field Representation

Crasenim Pharma MRs in your area can provide product samples, visual aids, and regular detailing visits to keep you informed about our antibiotic range.

More information for doctors →
FAQs

Antibiotic Range Franchise – FAQ

Which antibiotic products does Crasenim Pharma offer for franchise?
Our primary antibiotic franchise product is Amoxsenim-CV 625 — Amoxycillin 500mg + Clavulanic Acid 125mg. Additional antibiotic molecules may be added to the range over time. Contact us for the most current product list.
Is the antibiotic franchise available in all AP districts?
Yes. We offer antibiotic range franchise across all districts on the AP coastal belt — from Srikakulam to Vijayawada. Specific sub-territory availability within each district is confirmed during the franchise discussion.
What is the margin on the antibiotic range franchise?
Antibiotic products typically offer attractive wholesale-to-retail margins for PCD franchise partners. Exact margin structures are shared during the franchise enquiry process. Contact us via WhatsApp for current pricing.
Can I take the antibiotic franchise alongside other company franchises?
Yes, provided there is no conflict with another franchise for the same product in the same territory. PCD pharma franchise in India legally permits working with multiple companies simultaneously.
What support does Crasenim Pharma provide for the antibiotic franchise?
We provide promotional visual aids, product detailing cards, sample allocation, and product knowledge training. MR field support is also available in active territories across AP.

Enquire About Antibiotic Range Franchise in AP

PCD franchise, commission-based MR, and distributor opportunities available for the antibiotic range across all AP coastal belt districts.
